Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7109 0 0}You're curious about this place, too? I know the feeling.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}This place caught my interest ever since I heard you can face your inner self here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7107 0 0}I know it looks kind of seedy at first glance, but they do say not to judge a book by its cover.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7084 0 0}I remember this place... He brought me here before. That feels like such a long time ago now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 52 -1 0 0}Oh, sorry! I got a little distracted there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7142 0 0}This place allegedly lets you face your inner self. I've been wanting to give that another shot. Come on, let's head in.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7030 0 0}This place is strangely compelling. Every time we wrap up, I always immediately want to come back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}This time for sure, I won't fall asleep... All right, here goes![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7115 0 0}One minute, I was looking at a healing stone... The next, I was fast asleep.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}But my head feels so much clearer now, and not just because of the nap.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}It's kind of hard to describe. But it doesn't feel bad at all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7040 0 0}I don't know if I actually did get to face my inner self, but thank you for inviting me here anyway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7115 0 0}One minute I was looking at a healing stone, and the next I was fast asleep...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}But my head feels so much clearer now, and not just because of the nap.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}I felt the same way when I came here with him, too. Kind of strange, isn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}Anyway... Thank you for inviting me here, Aigis-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7115 0 0}I didn't even feel myself fall asleep again... I wonder if there's some kind of secret to that stone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}Not only that, but my head feels so clear. This place is just so mysterious...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7087 0 0}Maybe we should come back sometime. It'd be a nice change of pace every now and then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's almost nighttime... I should[n]head back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Вже пізно... Мені треба[n]повертатися до гуртожитку.[n]{f 1 1}
